goal: One coherent unit only. State the observable outcome.
background: PII-free summary using anonymous IDs such as DOC_A or CUSTOMER_1.
constraints: Do not create or modify code, tests, HTML, PDF, Skills, or MCP servers unless this packet explicitly allows it.
Do not paste customer names, birth data, original questions, or full document bodies into chat or docs.
Use SHA, not filename, to identify the latest source of truth.
Separate implementation report from verification report.

commands.name: pii_policy_scan
commands.command: Run a count-only sensitive string scan over approved handoff/docs paths.

done_when: Required commands have passing or explained results.
No forbidden file was read or modified.
stop_conditions: TASK_PACKET is missing or SHA mismatched.
Required source file is outside allowed_files.
Customer data, PDF text, or local profile contents are needed.
PDF rendering, API/LLM call, commit, push, or deploy would be required.
expected_outputs: CODEX_VERIFICATION_REPORT from a separate verifier session when requested
Updated RUN_STATE with current_stage, input_sha, output_sha, api_calls, pdf_rendered, retry_blocked, final_status
rollback_policy: Only revert files changed by this task. Do not revert unrelated user changes.

pii_policy.storage: Customer data and generated review artifacts stay only in gitignored areas.
